item.title: Department of War transports next-generation reactor in nuclear energy milestone
item.description: Department of War airlifts nuclear reactor via C-17 aircraft from California to Utah, advancing Trump's nuclear energy executive order for military us...

item.title: Schumer says Dems will fight voter ID push 'tooth and nail,' balks at DHS role in elections
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., said that Senate Democrats will block the GOP-backed SAVE America Act requiring voter ID and proof of ci...

item.title: Hillary Clinton clashes with Czech leader over Trump policies at Munich security conference
item.description: Former secretary of state Hillary Clinton clashed with Czech deputy prime minister who defended the Trump administration at Munich Security Conference

item.title: The one sentence in Rubio's Munich speech that revealed Trump's red line for Europe
item.description: At Munich Security Conference, Rubio articulates Trump's break with global status quo, pressing European allies to shoulder more defense responsibilit...

item.title: Campus Radicals Newsletter: Antifa-linked group tells students to mobilize, college students fake disabilities
item.description: Stay up to date with the Fox News Campus Radicals newsletter, which brings you the in-depth investigative stories from college campuses nationwide.
